commit_scope: Fix the BML native graph-node edges route after Hostinger deploy verification advanced past ideas resonance and exposed a slug-lookup parameter serialization failure.

local_validation.notes: The patched BML front-door source compiles and serves /api/health through the Rust native kernel. The graph-node-edges slug lookup flag is now a 0/1 integer with SQL-side bigint comparison, matching the native binder.

ci_validation.notes: PR checks will run after push.

deploy_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy for PR #2956 advanced past ideas-resonance, then failed because /api/graph/nodes/asset:audible-B0D2DRHSDJ/edges?direction=both returned 503 with error serializing parameter 1. This route used a Form equality result as a SQL boolean flag; the fix sends 0/1 and casts the placeholder as bigint.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: GET /api/graph/nodes/asset:audible-B0D2DRHSDJ/edges?direction=both should return 200 from X-Form-Router: native-kernel with X-Form-Handler: api_graph_node_edges instead of 503 persistence serialization failure.
test_flows: Hostinger Auto Deploy: BML front-door promoted read routes

phase_gate.notes: Pending local proof, PR CI, and post-merge deploy verification.
